name: BootExecute — Native Application Boot
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: BootExecute value lists native applications (pre-Win32 subsystem) that run during the earliest phase of Windows boot — before most drivers load.
forensic_value: The default value is 'autocheck autochk *' (disk check). Any additional entry runs before antivirus and most security tools initialize. Extremely powerful persistence used by bootkits and advanced rootkits.
